message:
fix: Comprehension variable scoping and nested class self parameter

- Add float() and complex() builtin substitution in comprehensions
- Add generic call fallback using genExprWithSubs for arguments
- Track and clean up var_renames in list comprehensions to prevent leaks
- Fix complex constant inf/nan handling with std.math.inf(f64)
- Skip 'self' parameter in __new__ (like cls, represents the class)
